component.name: @@NAME_LONG@@
component.summary: NZRCode. The AI-augmented developer's control room.

description.p: NZRCode is a fork of Visual Studio Code OSS reframed for developers who work augmented by AI rather than typing code. The default surface is a Mission Control — one station per repository, each running a specify → clarify → plan → tasks → implement pipeline — while the editor, terminal, and file explorer remain available behind the scenes.
